sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2021-08-03 11:59:44.123456');
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2022-01-01 00:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT epoch_us(event_time) FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1;
SELECT epoch_us(event_time) + 1000000 AS adjusted_time FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1;
